cards.fr: C'est trop tard, je serai déjà parti.
cards.en: It's too late, I will have left by then.
cards.note: Use of future perfect tense to express an action that will be completed before another action in the future.

cards.fr: J'ai dû lancer la machine à laver.
cards.en: I had to start the washing machine.
cards.note: Use 'lancer' for starting machines or devices.
Use 'mal habillé' for feeling underdressed, 'sous-habillé' is also possible but less common.
